header.title: Belle-Ile-en-Mer-56-Sauzon-eglise-Saint-Nicolas-Maisons-quai-Joseph-Naudin-Port-Phare-byRundvald.jpg
header.description: View of Sauzon at Belle-Île-en-Mer from the courtyard of the presbytery. In the foreground on the left, we see the bell tower of the Saint-Nicolas church of Sauzon, then the houses on the Joseph Naudin quay and the port of Sauzon, with the lighthouse in the background.
header.author: Rundvald

lieux.label: rochers au fond de la crique
